    void
    RestaurantSettingsController.loadRestaurantSettings(RestaurantSettings settings)
    Loads restaurant settings into the tables.

  • Uses of RestaurantSettings in DAO

    Methods in DAO with parameters of type RestaurantSettings
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.updateClosingHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
    Updates only the closing time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
    Boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.updateMaxTable(RestaurantSettings r)
    Updates the global maximum number of tables allowed in the restaurant.
    Boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.updateOpeningHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
    Updates only the opening time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
